## Scope Checklist

- [ ] No IRS formula change
- [ ] No Social Security formula change
- [ ] No URL parameter or saved-simulation format change
- [ ] No locale behavior change
- [ ] No theme behavior change
- [ ] Fiscal changes, if any, cite official Portuguese sources

## Validation

- [ ] `npm ci`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run vitest -- --run`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run verify:production-build`
- [ ] `npm run cy:e2e:run`
